sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 7:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 7:1
items.html: It stops being an Emanator and becomes an emanated being right at the beginning of the formation of the will to receive in the emanated being, called phase four in the desire. (Inner Light, Part 1, Chap 2, item 3)
